rule: Cursor orbits canvas on a circle. SELECT stamps cursor color onto canvas section aligned with cursor position. 12=top, 6=bottom, 3=right, 9=left, 45deg=diagonals.
meta: Level 1: canvas starts black, target is black-top + white-bottom. Cursor starts white at 12. Navigate to 6 o'clock (RIGHT,DOWN,DOWN,LEFT), SELECT. 5 steps.

rule: Palette shows target pattern. Canvas starts partially matching target. Only stamp what's MISSING. 45deg positions paint diagonal stripes. Stamps overwrite — order matters.
meta: Level 2: target is white-top + black-bottom + olive-diagonal-bottom-right. Canvas already has black bottom. Stamp white from 12 (1 step), then olive from ~4 o'clock (click indicator + rotate + SELECT). Efficiency = see delta between current state and target.

description: UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT rotate cursor around canvas on a circular orbit. Which key continues rotation depends on current position: at top LEFT/RIGHT are horizontal, at sides UP/DOWN continue the circle. The cursor visits 8 positions: 12, 1:30, 3, 4:30, 6, 7:30, 9, 10:30 (clock positions).

Clicking an indicator square at top-right changes cursor fill color to that indicator's color. Does NOT reset canvas. Palette swatches on the left are visual reference only — click the INDICATORS to change color.

SELECT stamps cursor color onto canvas. The POSITION of cursor determines WHERE on canvas gets painted: directly above=top half, directly below=bottom half, 45deg=diagonal stripe. Cardinal positions (12,3,6,9) paint clean halves. Diagonal positions paint triangular sections.

Canvas starts partially matching target. Only stamp what's DIFFERENT. Check what's already correct before painting. Stamps overwrite each other — paint background colors first, then foreground/diagonal overlays last. The palette image IS the target pattern.
